flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Luzerne County Community College rose 16% between 2021 and 2024 ($5.7k → $6.6k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Luzerne County Community College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (4.2% → 0.0%).
